config.title: Karta urządzenia #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'CCardBuilder #include "50131" 'GetMenu #include "50506" 'section_* #include "50222" 'std_openform_field_hli #include "50610" 'fire_choicelist #include "50200"
'add_to_choicelist 'delete_from_choicelist_hli #include "50102"
'popraw dane #include "50609"
#include "50101"
dim g_pCardBuilder : set g_pCardBuilder = nothing
function fopen : fopen = false
if not HARUI(UOR_READ(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_OBIEKT)) then exit function end if
set g_pCardBuilder = new CCardBuilder
g_pCardBuilder.prepare_framework_ex page_.topelement,false,true,true,CTRLID_LEFT_PANE,CTRLID_RIGHT_PANE
build_menu rebuild_contents
section_fopen THIS_FILE
fopen = true end function
'called once to build menu sub build_menu 'dodajemy menu items with g_pCardBuilder.menu
.add_item "Popraw dane", "varFunction=""popraw_dane""" ' .add_item "Nowa umowa", "varFunction=""nowa_umowa""" ' .add_item "Nowa choroba", "varFunction=""nowa_choroba""" ' .add_item "Nowa nieobecność", "varFunction=""nowa_nieobecnosc""" ' .add_item "Nowy inny składnik", "varFunction=""nowy_inny"""
end with end sub
dim g_pPlugFactory : set g_pPlugFactory = nothing
'called on every root object change (including fopen) sub rebuild_contents
set g_pPlugFactory = doc_.getmodule(60308) with g_pCardBuilder .reset_framework
.toolpane.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = page_.root.n5klient_obiekt_get_zasady_obslugi_text
'title .title = Ucase(page_.root.text)
g_pPlugFactory.plug_podstawowe .new_section(.fixedpane, "Informacje podstawowe"), page_.rootidobj #ifndef _TORAL g_pPlugFactory.plug_naprawy .new_section(.leftpane, "Naprawy"), page_.rootidobj g_pPlugFactory.plug_protokoly .new_section(.leftpane, "Zgłoszenia serwisowe"), page_.rootidobj g_pPlugFactory.plug_wlasciciele .new_section(.leftpane, "Właściciele"), page_.rootidobj g_pPlugFactory.plug_zakupy .new_section(.leftpane, "Zakupy"), page_.rootidobj #endif
' .new_section .leftpane,"Transakcje" ' .new_section .leftpane,"Płatności" ' .new_section .leftpane,"Kalendarz"
' g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_pic .new_section(.rightpane, "Zdjęcie"), page_.rootidobj ' .new_section .rightpane,"Konta" ' .new_section .rightpane,"Umowy" ' .new_section .rightpane,"Nieobecności" ' .new_section .rightpane,"Choroby" end with end sub
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE set g_pCardBuilder = nothing end function
function frefresh rebuild_contents end function
'---------------------------------------------------------------- function c##CTRLID_LEFT_PANE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c##CTRLID_LEFT_PANE##_ongetdata = true end function function c##CTRLID_LEFT_PANE##_ontabitemactivate(oTabCtrl,nActiveItem,bFirstTime) ' if not bFirstTime then ' exit function ' end if ' ' select case nActiveItem ' case 2 ' g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_transakcje oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj ' case 3 ' g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_platnosci oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj ' case 4 ' g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_kalendarz oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj,trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) ' end select end function
function c##CTRLID_RIGHT_PANE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c##CTRLID_RIGHT_PANE##_ongetdata = true end function function c##CTRLID_RIGHT_PANE##_ontabitemactivate(oTabCtrl,nActiveItem,bFirstTime) ' if not bFirstTime then ' exit function ' end if ' ' select case nActiveItem ' case 2 ' g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_konta oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj ' case 3 ' g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_umowy oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj ' case 4 ' g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_nieobecnosci oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj ' case 5 ' g_pPlugFactory.plug_pracownik_choroby oTabCtrl.element(nActiveItem), page_.rootidobj ' end select end function '---------------------------------------------------------------- function nowa_umowa doc_.postcommand "OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PLUMOWA,0,USAGE_ZAWARCIE)" end function
function nowa_choroba doc_.postcommand "OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PLCHOROBA,0,USAGE_EDIT)" end function
function nowa_nieobecnosc doc_.postcommand "OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PLNIEOB,0,USAGE_EDIT)" end function
function nowy_inny doc_.postcommand "OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5PLPOZOSTALE,0,USAGE_EDIT)" end function
